title: Monkey King's Staff
description: Adds Sun Wukong's illustrious staff, the Ruyi Jingu Bang from Journey to The West!
body:
**INFO**

_*Black Myth: Wukong came out a few months ago; yet theres little to no mods about it, or its original source!*
*Now, originally created to be a weapon for personal use for Leatherbounded is..*_

# ..The Ruyi Jingu Bang!

**CREDITS:**

**Dino** - Owner (Modeler / the one who made the mod)

**Leatherbounded** -  Totally the real Monkey King! (Modeler/guy who wanted the staff in minecraft REALLY badly)

--
**WHAT IS JOURNEY TO THE WEST?**

Journey to The West is a old chinese novel written by Wu Cheng'en, detailing the early life of the Monkey King and further on his redemption alongside Zhu Bajie, Ao Lie and Sha Wujing under their master (and main character) Tripitaka!

--
**WHAT DOES THIS MOD ADD?**

What it says on the box, Sun Wukong's staff! It lacks any growing capabilities and has the same stats as a netherite sword, but it is both faster AND unbreakable!

--
**CRAFTING RECIPE?**

**Here it is!**

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c5d5f796560a5a865f61508d8e4ef56712a1289.png)

 Why so expensive? Well, it IS an endgame weapon..
..Also, we needed a way to explain ingame how heavy it is through the crafting recipe!


# USAGE IN MODPACKS+ OTHER STUFF
Feel free to use our mod in your modpacks, videos, whatever! HOWEVER, please credit the mod and link to our page, thank you!
